productDisplayName: ADIDAS Originals Men Adiracer Remodel Black Casual Shoes
description: A fab original for a true motorsport fan, the Adiracer Remodel shoe from adidas originals comes in a motosport-inspired design and offers exceptional comfort for the man of speed. UpperLeather upper with carbon fibre accentsLacing system with tonal black eyelets for a snug, customised FitLightly padded tongue and collar for optimum fitTextile inner lining with a cushioned footbed for all-day comfortMidsoleLow profile Goodyear midsole for absolute durability, comfort and ability to be resoledOutsoleGrooved rubber outsole for absolute grip and tractionShoe careWipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dustDo not store in direct sunlightWarranty provided by the brand owner / manufacturer
